title: SimpleJoinMessage (SJM)
description: A simple join message plugin · Web Editor · With Hex/Gradient Support · PlaceholderAPI Ready · Send Delay
body:
[Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/plugins/sjm) | [Spigot](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/103413/) | [GitHub](https://go.happyareabean.cc/sjm) | [Wiki](https://docs.happyareabean.cc/docs/category/simplejoinmessage) | [Configuration](https://go.happyareabean.cc/sjmconfig) | [Discord](https://go.happyareabean.cc/supportdiscord)

## ![logo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/HappyAreaBean/SimpleJoinMessage/master/images/logo.png)

SimpleJoinMessage is a simple join message plugin that provides you with the easiest join message solution!

[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/347679658369613826?style=for-the-badge&logo=DISCORD&logoColor=%23fff&color=%235762d6)](https://go.happyareabean.cc/supportdiscord) [![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/%24-Donate-ff69b4?style=for-the-badge)](https://ko-fi.com/happyareabean)


## **Features**
* **Send delay.** Send join message after X seconds!
* **PlaceholderAPI support.**
* **Web editor.** Edit your join message with Web UI!
* **Custom your time format.** If using built-in `{time}` placeholder
* **MiniMessage support.** Hex color (RGB), gradient, clickable, run command and hover text etc…

## **Web Editor**
![editor](https://i.imgur.com/D8UL2bY.png)

## **Placeholders**
SJM have 3 built-in placeholders supported: `{player}`, `{online}` and `{time}`.

If you want to use other placeholders, you need to install PlaceholderAPI.

## **Format**
SimpleJoinMessage use MiniMessage you can read more about the format **[here](https://docs.adventure.kyori.net/minimessage/format.html)**.
PlaceholderAPI is also supported.

## **Usage**

Everything for the setup you need to know is explained in the settings.yml!

**[Want to see an example settings.yml file?](https://go.happyareabean.cc/sjmconfig)**

## **Commands**
Permission: **sjm.admin**

* **/sjm reload**
  * Reload SimpleJoinMessage
* **/sjm editor**
  * Open join message editor
* **/sjm applyedits <token>**
  * Apply edit from editor
* **/sjm reloadshow (rs)**
  * Reload SimpleJoinMessage settings and show the join message after reloading
* **/sjm about**
  * Show SimpleJoinMessage plugin info
* **/sjm show**
  * Send a join message in your chat
